title: Store candidate pattern as ~/apprentice/patterns/<id>/manifest.json
completion_summary: Pattern persistence at ~/apprentice/patterns/<id>/manifest.json. Manifest schema: id, uuid, description, centroid, record_count, status (pending/approved), created_at. New/Open/Save/Load/List/SetStatus with google/uuid. 13 tests pass: UUID gen, explicit ID, defaults, missing Load error, List empty/with patterns, SetStatus, restart survival, Open creates dir, List skips non-dir/bad manifests/missing dir, JSON round-trip.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest includes centroid embedding, description, record count
